_description: Adaptive timeout policy per Epic #2150 #2201. Defaults derived from Phase-0 #2174 dog-food observations.

fleet-red-team-rate.rationale: qwen2.5-coder:32b on Tailscale fleet hit 907s p99 per Phase-0 #2174; 1200s adds 30% headroom

fleet-dispatch-basic.rationale: qwen2.5-coder:7b or smaller fleet models; faster turnaround

hamr-cache-stat.rationale: local file append; should never exceed 30s

lane:trivial.rationale: trivial work shouldn't exceed half the class budget
